roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING/X:RAMY YASSINE, PAROLE AGENT, PRESENT IN COURT/CAL:DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S OR PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/PDP/X:THE DA'S MOTION TO AMEND THE PETITION TO ALLEGE VIOLATION #1 - ABSCONDING PAROLE SUPERVISION, IS GRANTED,/WIAPTR/3000ADV/3000ADM/X:THE PAROLEE'S ADMISSION IS AS TO VIOLATION #1 ONLY,/3000REIN/PAJ:90 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 17 DAYS,/4019HALF/X:THE COURT DISMISSES VIOLATIONS #2 & #3 PURSUANT TO PC 1385, IN THE INTEREST OF JUSTICE,/X:PAROLE REINSTATED TO:10-17-20/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPONRELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/
